name: chart/meter
description: Progress meter in bar or gauge variant with threshold coloring.

meta.name: Meter
meta.description: Progress meter in bar or gauge variant with threshold coloring.

examples.title: Basic meter
examples.code:
import { Meter } from '@cascade-ui/charts'

<Meter value={72} label="CPU usage" />

whenToUse: Showing a rated or gauged value within a known min/max range
Surfacing threshold-based status (e.g. CPU, disk, score) as a bar or gauge
whenNotToUse: Showing task completion progress — use a ProgressBar
Comparing a value against a target with range bands — use Bullet

related.name: Bullet
related.reason: Use when a target marker and qualitative bands are needed

related.name: Kpi
related.reason: Use for a headline metric without a bounded range

intent.a11yRationale: Renders with role="meter" exposing min, max, and current value to assistive tech.
